home.title: HealthTech Ecosystem
home.description: Initial frontend with Next.js, Tailwind, internationalization, and offline-first strategy.

profileSetup.title: Set up your body measurements
profileSetup.subtitle: These metrics help us personalize biomechanics and training recommendations.

help.weight: Your current body weight used for personalized load guidance.
help.height: Your standing height used for movement leverage estimates.
help.femurLength: Measure from your hip joint to the top of your knee.
help.torsoLength: Measure from the base of your neck to your hip.

profileSetup.success: Data saved locally. It will sync to Supabase when online.
profileSetup.offlineNotice: Offline mode: your data is saved now and will sync automatically when you are online again.
